Mbappe scores his 10th goal of this World Cup! He passes Messi in this World Cup by 2 goals !🔥 

Also, passes Messi with all-time World Cup goals at 22 goals! 😤

He’s only 27. Messi is 39 years old and played more World Cup games than him!  

Mbappe shredding the record books.

items.title: FINAL: #Magic 103, Celtics 97
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
FINAL: #Magic 103, Celtics 97

Malik Reneau scores 19 points all in the second half, Au’Diese Toney reaches 18, Will Baker notches 15 points and 6 rebounds and Philip Wheeler adds 10.

Orlando wins its 4th straight contest to go 4-1 in Las Vegas under coach D.J. Bakker.

On a record-breaking night, everything came together.

items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
To the 4th: #Magic 81, Celtics 71

Orlando pieced together a strong third quarter, outscoring Boston 36-23 in the 10-minute frame.

Will Baker leads with 15 points, Malik Reneau has 14, Au’Diese Toney 12 and Johnell Davis with 8.

Orlando shot 13 for 18 in the third quarter.

items.title: "Adapt and be a leader."
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
"Adapt and be a leader."

ICYMI: Get to know Dillon Mitchell on and off the court.

The Celtics are getting a high-character former team captain, molded by repeatedly starting from scratch and unforgettable experiences with Rick Pitino.
